scripts.prod:backend:run-host: npm run build --workspace @vibe/shared && npm run build --workspace @vibe/backend && npm run migrate --workspace @vibe/backend && npm run start --workspace @vibe/backend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @vibe/shared && npm run build --workspace @vibe/backend && npm run build --workspace @vibe/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @vibe/shared && npm run lint --workspace @vibe/backend && npm run lint --workspace @vibe/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @vibe/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @vibe/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @vibe/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @vibe/shared && npm run test --workspace @vibe/backend && npm run test --workspace @vibe/frontend
